groups.name: app.trusted-proxy
groups.description: Trusted reverse-proxy settings for client IP resolution.

properties.name: app.base-url
properties.description: Public base URL used in outbound links and redirects.

properties.name: app.auth.login-success-url
properties.description: Post-login redirect path.

properties.name: app.auth.lock.max-attempts
properties.description: Failed login attempts before account lockout.

properties.name: app.auth.lock.duration
properties.description: Account lockout duration.

properties.name: app.auth.token.email-verification-expiry
properties.description: Email verification token lifetime.

properties.name: app.auth.token.password-reset-expiry
properties.description: Password reset token lifetime.

properties.name: app.auth.rate-limit.backend
properties.description: Rate limit storage backend: memory or redis.

properties.name: app.auth.rate-limit.login-per-minute
properties.description: Login attempts allowed per client IP per minute.

properties.name: app.auth.rate-limit.register-per-minute
properties.description: Registration attempts allowed per client IP per minute.

properties.name: app.auth.rate-limit.reset-per-minute
properties.description: Password reset attempts allowed per client IP per minute.

properties.name: app.auth.rate-limit.check-per-minute
properties.description: Availability check requests allowed per client IP per minute.

properties.name: app.auth.rate-limit.resend-per-minute
properties.description: Verification resend requests allowed per client IP per minute.

properties.name: app.auth.rate-limit.admin-per-minute
properties.description: Admin POST requests allowed per client IP per minute.

properties.name: app.auth.check.enumeration-safe
properties.description: Avoid revealing whether usernames or emails exist.

properties.name: app.auth.check.availability-cache-ttl
properties.description: Cache TTL for username and email availability checks.

properties.name: app.auth.oauth2.enabled
properties.description: Enable OAuth2 login providers.

properties.name: app.auth.oauth2.providers
properties.description: Enabled OAuth2 provider registration IDs.

properties.name: app.auth.bootstrap-admin.enabled
properties.description: Create an initial admin user on startup when no admin exists.

properties.name: app.auth.bootstrap-admin.username
properties.description: Bootstrap admin username.

properties.name: app.auth.bootstrap-admin.email
properties.description: Bootstrap admin email.

properties.name: app.auth.bootstrap-admin.password
properties.description: Bootstrap admin password.

properties.name: app.auth.maintenance.login-attempt-retention
properties.description: Retention period for login attempt audit records.

properties.name: app.auth.maintenance.expired-token-retention
properties.description: Retention period for expired auth tokens.

properties.name: app.trusted-proxy.enabled
properties.description: Trust X-Forwarded-For from configured proxy networks.

properties.name: app.trusted-proxy.trusted-networks
properties.description: Proxy network prefixes allowed to supply forwarded headers.
